scripts.dev:server:debug: cross-env DEBUG=1 DEBUG_API=1 DEBUG_ATTENDANCE_TIMING=1 node server/index.js
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n server,app -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:full:debug: concurrently -n server,app -c blue,green "npm run dev:server:debug" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:live: concurrently -n app,sync -c blue,green "cross-env PORT=3001 node dev/server.js" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3001 && browser-sync start -p 3000 --proxy http://127.0.0.1:3001 --files 'dev/**/*.html' 'dev/**/*.css' 'dev/**/*.js'"
